reviews.author: Gavi Liebowitz
reviews.text: I called Mr Junk to have some really heavy pavers removed and he was the fairest price and showed up really quickly. I would use him again and recommend him to anyone. 10/10

reviews.author: Michelle Rivera
reviews.text: I called Mr. Junk removal on New years Day to get rid of some boxes. It was snowing and they were there within an hour and removed everything and did it professionally and quickly and the price was right. Would highly recommend and would use them again. Thank you

reviews.author: Jennifer Eisenberg
reviews.text: They cleaned up my entire basement of all the junk from a recent move in. Very efficient and affordable.

reviews.author: Andrew Greenstein
reviews.text: Outstanding Service from Mr. Junk Junk Removal! Mr. Junk - Junk Removal did such an amazing job and were an absolute pleasure to…

reviews.author: J Silver
reviews.text: Great to deal with. I would use them again guaranteed.
